name: CHINATOWN BAKERY
subtitle: Chinese & Hong Kong Patisserie
tagline: Fresh egg tarts, pineapple buns, and mooncakes baked daily in the heart of London's Chinatown.
taglineFull: A neighbourhood bakery in the heart of London's Chinatown. Every piece is made the way it's been made for generations.
registeredAddress: 25 Wardour Street, London W1D 6PP, United Kingdom
pageTitle: CHINATOWN BAKERY — Chinese & Hong Kong Patisserie
pastriesSubtitle: Baked in small batches through the day.
cakesSubtitle: Made for special days. 48 hours notice.
chocolateSubtitle: Hand-pressed for Mid-Autumn and all year round.

menuItems.name: Egg Tart (Dàn Tǎ)
menuItems.desc: Flaky puff shell, warm vanilla custard, baked until just set

menuItems.name: Pineapple Bun (Bō Luó Bāo)
menuItems.desc: Soft milk bun with a crisp, sugary topping — no pineapple, just the name

menuItems.name: Custard Bun (Nǎi Huáng Bāo)
menuItems.desc: Steamed bun with a molten salted-custard centre

menuItems.name: Sesame Ball (Má Tuán)
menuItems.desc: Glutinous rice shell, red bean paste, rolled in sesame and fried

menuItems.name: Red Bean Bun
menuItems.desc: Steamed bun filled with sweet adzuki bean paste

menuItems.name: Curry Puff
menuItems.desc: Golden pastry with a spiced potato and pea filling

cakeItems.name: Fresh Cream Sponge
cakeItems.desc: Light sponge with fresh cream and seasonal fruit

cakeItems.name: Mango Mochi Cake
cakeItems.desc: Layered sponge, mango, and soft mochi — a Chinatown favourite

cakeItems.name: Durian Cake
cakeItems.desc: For the brave — real Musang King durian cream between soft sponge

chocolateItems.name: Lotus Paste (Golden)
chocolateItems.desc: Classic sweet lotus paste, baked in a traditional mould

chocolateItems.name: Red Bean (Whole Yolk)
chocolateItems.desc: Red bean paste with a salted egg yolk at its heart

chocolateItems.name: White Lotus & Nuts
chocolateItems.desc: White lotus paste with mixed nuts and a yolk — the festive standard

chocolateItems.name: Snow Skin (Mango)
chocolateItems.desc: Chilled, no-bake snow-skin mooncake with fresh mango
